Deft Zurich'S Ntc Of Hrg On Demurrer; Ntc Of Hrg On Mo To Strike & Mo; Memo Of P&A In Support Thereof, Calendar Motion: Hearing, Calendar Motion: Demurrer, Calendar Motion: To Strike
Off Calendar Nov-20-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Jeffrey S. Raskin, Esq. 364-6300 for pltfs & opposing parties; Richard Mancino, Esq. 212/728-8243 & Ann M. Heimberger, Esq. 986-5700 for deft & moving party Zurich Insurance Company.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling with the exception that the demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the fraudulent transfer count (3rd cause of action). 20 days to amend. Deft to prepare order.
In addition, the Court granted Richard Mancino's pro hac vice application.
